title: Extension of Closing Date for the Pre-Qualification Tender
description: The Procurement Management Unit (PMU) hereby informs all interested bidders that, following the approval of the Tender Board, the submission and opening date for the above-mentioned tender has been extended by seven (7) days. New Closing and Opening Date: 13th October 2025. Original Closing and Opening Date: 6th October 2025. The extension has been made to allow wider participation and ensure fair competition.

contact.address: Mwai Kibaki Road, Plot No. 53, Block C, Mikocheni B, P.O. Box 1133, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
